Please read CONTRIBUTING.md before opening this PR — it is short, and it is
what review will hold you to.

Two things that most often send a PR back:

  1. No issue. Open one first, written by you rather than an agent, and wait
     for a go-ahead. We would rather discuss the approach than reject a
     finished PR.
  2. Unread agent output. All the code here is agent-written and that is
     fine — code the submitting human has not read is not.
-->
